case_title: G. B. PATEL VS. PABLO DELA GERDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1507 CALIFORNIA ST. ROOM 104 S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED . FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $20.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, G. B. SERVED JUL-22-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT DELA CERDA, PABLO
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DELA GERDA, PABLO
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT DELA CERDA, PABLO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
